description: Covers trip operations, driver activity, vehicle data, trip lifecycle, and ride completion metrics. Use for questions about trips taken, driver performance, cancellations, fares, and distances.
Covers payment transactions, refunds, payment methods, revenue analysis, and financial reconciliation. Use for questions about money collected, refunds issued, and payment failures.
Covers user registrations, user activity, login patterns, inactive users, and user demographics. Use for questions about user growth, signups, and user engagement.
Covers customer support tickets, complaint categories, resolution times, and escalations. Use for questions about open tickets, critical issues, and support workload.
Covers ratings, reviews, and feedback given by users and drivers after trips. Use for questions about satisfaction scores, low-rated drivers, and feedback trends.
